sourceList.title: Foundation for Medieval Genealogy - CLAREMBAUD de Noyers (-1196 or after).
Our royal, titled, noble and commoner ancestors

zh.lifeSummary: 當Seigneur Clerembaud de Noyers於1150年出生在法國布格諾也斯時，他的父親Milon de Noyers IV40歲，母親Odeline de Chappes20歲。他和Alix de Brienne Rameru至少有1個女兒。他去世於1196年在以色列מחוז הצפוןעַכּוֹ享年46歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Seigneur Clerembaud de Noyers于1150年出生在法国布格諾也斯时，他的父亲Milon de Noyers IV40岁，母亲Odeline de Chappes20岁。他和Alix de Brienne Rameru至少有1个女儿。他去世于1196年在以色列מחוז הצפוןעַכּוֹ享年46岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Noyers
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Lincolnshire): variant of Bowyer , with post-medieval excrescent -s.

variants.name: Bowyer
meanings: English: occupational name for a maker or seller of bows, or an archer, from Middle English bowyere, an agent derivative of Old English boga ‘bow’. Compare Bowman .

en.lifeSummary: When Seigneur Clerembaud de Noyers was born in 1150, in Noyers, Yonne, Burgundy, France, his father, Milon de Noyers IV, was 40 and his mother, Odeline de Chappes, was 20. He had at least 1 daughter with Alix de Brienne Rameru. He died in 1196, in Acre, Northern, Israel, at the age of 46.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Seigneur Clerembaud de Noyers est né en 1150, à Noyers, Yonne, Bourgogne, France, son père, Milon de Noyers IV, avait 40 ans et sa mère, Odeline de Chappes, avait 20 ans. Il a eu au moins 1 fille avec Alix de Brienne Rameru. Il est décédé en 1196, à Acre, Northern, Israël, à l’âge de 46 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Seigneur Clerembaud de Noyers 1150 in Noyers, Yonne, Burgund, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Milon de Noyers IV 40 und seine Mutter Odeline de Chappes 20. Er hatte mit Alix de Brienne Rameru mindestens 1 Tochter. Er starb 1196 im Alter von 46 Jahren in Acre, Northern, Israel.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Seigneur Clerembaud de Noyers è nato il nel 1150 nel Noyers, Yonne, Bourgogne, Francia, il suo padre, Milon de Noyers IV, aveva 40 anni e il suo madre, Odeline de Chappes, aveva 20 anni. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlia con Alix de Brienne Rameru. Morì nel 1196, nel Acre, Northern, Israele, all'età di 46 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Seigneur Clerembaud de Noyersが1150年にフランスボウルゴグンイオンノイエルズで生まれた時，父Milon de Noyers IVは40歳，母Odeline de Chappesは20歳であった。彼はAlix de Brienne Rameruとの間に少なくとも1人の娘をもうけた。彼は1196年にイスラエルמחוז הצפוןעַכּוֹで46歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Seigneur Clerembaud de Noyers(이)가 1150년 프랑스 부르고그니 욘 노예어스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Milon de Noyers IV(은)는 40세였고, 그의 어머니 Odeline de Chappes(은)는 20세였다. 그는 Alix de Brienne Rameru(와)과 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1196년 이스라엘 מחוז הצפון עַכּוֹ에서 46세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Seigneur Clerembaud de Noyers nasceu em 1150, em Noyers, Yonne, Bourgogne, França, seu pai, Milon de Noyers IV, tinha 40 anos e sua mãe, Odeline de Chappes, tinha 20 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filha com Alix de Brienne Rameru. Ele faleceu em 1196, em Acre, Northern, Israel, com 46 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Seigneur Clerembaud de Noyers родился в 1150 г. в местности ноиирс, енн, бургогн, Франция, его отцу по имени Milon de Noyers IV было 40 лет, а матери, которую звали Odeline de Chappes, 20. У него была по крайней мере 1 дочь от Alix de Brienne Rameru. Он умер в 1196 г. в местности עַכּוֹ, מחוז הצפון, Израиль в возрасте 46 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Seigneur Clerembaud de Noyers nació en 1150, en Noyers, Yonne, Bourgogne, Francia, su papá, Milon de Noyers IV, tenía 40 años y su mamá, Odeline de Chappes, tenía 20 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hija con Alix de Brienne Rameru. Murió en 1196, en Acre, Northern, Israel, a la edad de 46 años.
